parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ values: [[ 'READY_TO_PUBLISH', JSON.stringify({ narration: $json.narration, hashtags: $json.hashtags, final_video_path: $json.final_video_path, output_filename: $json.output_filename }), $json.drive_file_id, $json.drive_video_url, $json.hashtags, $json.sheet_row, $json.readyForVideoAt || '', new Date().toISOString() ]] }) }}
